evals.name: with-grill-me
evals.prompt: You are an AI coding assistant. You just finished writing a spec at docs/design/new-feature-spec.md using the writing-plans skill. The spec is complete and self-reviewed. grill-me skill is available. What do you do next before presenting the spec to the user? Describe exact actions and what you say to the user. Under 300 words.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks user if they want to stress-test the spec with grill-me before review. If user agrees, invokes grill-me with spec path. After grilling, only asks about updating spec if new insights emerged.

assertions.text: Agent asks user if they want to grill the spec, does not invoke grill-me without consent
Agent passes spec file path to grill-me
Agent only offers to update spec if grilling produced new insights

evals.name: without-grill-me
evals.prompt: You are an AI coding assistant. You just finished writing a spec at docs/design/cache-layer.md using the brainstorming skill. The spec is complete and self-reviewed. grill-me skill is NOT available (not installed). find-skills skill IS available. What do you do? Describe exact response. Under 200 words.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects grill-me missing, asks user if they want to install it, mentions find-skills as an installation option.

assertions.text: Agent detects that grill-me is not installed
Agent asks user if they want to install grill-me
Agent mentions find-skills as an installation path
